user.title: TaskerHA Companion
user.description:
TaskerHA Companion provides services for retrieving Home Assistant registry data (labels, areas, devices) for use with the TaskerHA Android app.

No configuration is required. Click Submit to enable the integration.

get_registry_data.name: Get Registry Data
get_registry_data.description: Retrieve all labels, devices, and areas with their associated entity IDs in a single call. Designed for use with the TaskerHA Android app.

send_taskerha_message.name: Send Message to TaskerHA
send_taskerha_message.description: Fire a taskerha_message event that triggers an On HA Message profile in the TaskerHA Android app.

type.name: Type
type.description: Optional message type, matched against the Type filter in the TaskerHA profile.

message.name: Message
message.description: Optional message body, matched against the Message filter in the TaskerHA profile.
